title: Ametrine In End
description: Ametrine In End adds a new mineral called ametrine to the end dimension, above netherite tier
body:
Ametrine In End adds a new mineral called ametrine to the end dimension, above netherite tier

This Mineral adds a new set all above netherite and even above Ruby from my mod Ruby Above Netherite and set 4 times the durability of the netherite set and two points more on all his stats, the ametrine mineral is found between y=14 and y=34

This Mod is very compatible with my Ruby Above Netherite more because is even superior than that material and so more than Netherite

This mods have as well Hammer, Paxel, Excavator and more things in coming
![Ametrine tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/901d1c302afb23411631f33574f077d520126327.png)
![Ametrine Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a198f7d92ca7b56ae5e989bad82c000626b9f48.png)

Versions:
